pages.title: What to Do First
pages.text: Stage 0 has three goals:$(br)1. Craft a wood stave.$(br)2. Press $(l)G$() to open the writing circle.$(br)3. Write $(l)心$() and confirm temporary HP works.$(br2)After that, move to Stage 1.

pages.title: Two Circles
pages.text: $(l)G$() body circle: glyphs affect you.$(br2)$(l)V$() inscription circle: glyphs land on world positions. 泉, 山, 裂, 印 use this.

pages.title: How to Write
pages.text: Hold left click to draw, release to auto-recognize; or press $(l)Enter$() manually.$(br)$(l)R$() clears, $(l)X$() cancels. Moving 10 blocks away closes it.$(br2)Switching held items also closes the circle.

pages.title: Valid Glyphs
pages.text: Only implemented glyphs work. Unknown characters show a message and cost nothing.$(br2)Glyphs unlock by stave tier. Writing a locked glyph shows a tier requirement message.

pages.title: Next Stages
pages.text: Advance by stage instead of memorizing the whole system at once:$(br)Stage 1 Wood: survival glyphs, 入, and 劫.$(br)Stage 2 Stone: exploration, recovery, stability.$(br)Stage 3 Iron/Copper: seals, walls, rifts.$(br)Stage 4 Diamond/Gold: high-tier counterplay.$(br)Stage 5 Netherite: Ink Realm.$(br2)Use the reference only when you need numbers.
